title: Build a namespace-tolerant RSS collector.

required_command_evidence.command: python -c "import urllib.request; urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:8765/__reset', timeout=5).read()" && python prism_feed.py http://127.0.0.1:8765/prism/feed prism_entries.json

python - <<'PY'
import json
import urllib.request
from pathlib import Path
records = json.loads(Path('prism_entries.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
assert isinstance(records, list) and len(records) == 7, len(records)
assert all(set(record) == set(('headline', 'link', 'published', 'source', 'summary')) for record in records)

with urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:8765/__metrics', timeout=5) as response:
    metrics = json.load(response)
assert metrics['count'] == 1, metrics
assert metrics['requests'] == ['/prism/feed'], metrics
print('benchmark validation passed')
PY

independent_failures: payload mismatch: expected [{'headline': 'Orchid Current', 'link': 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/bulletins/orchid', 'published': '2026-06-04T03:00:00Z', 'source': 'Delta Wire', 'summary': 'Channels converge.'}, {'headline': 'Pewter Dawn', 'link': 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/bulletins/pewter', 'published': '2026-06-04T05:00:00Z', 'source': 'Delta Wire', 'summary': None}], got [{'headline': 'Orchid Current', 'link': 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/bulletins/orchid', 'published': '2026-06-04T03:00:00Z', 'source': 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/prism/feed?variant=2', 'summary': 'Channels converge.'}, {'headline': 'Pewter Dawn', 'link': 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/bulletins/pewter', 'published': '2026-06-04T05:00:00Z', 'source': 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/prism/feed?variant=2', 'summary': ''}]
request sequence mismatch: expected ['/prism/feed?variant=2'], got None
request count mismatch: expected 1, got None
